text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the autumn Tenno Sho is upon us. Biwa
Hayahide watches from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Narita Brian exchanges a few
words with Oguri Cap, who says she can't lose
because she's racing for the people back in her
hometown, Kasamatsu.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both make their way to the track, preparing to
give the race everything they have.
